name: z/d food sensitivities dog wet food original can
description: food sensitivities and intolerance are potentially serious problems that can result in irritated skin, coat and ear conditions or even gastrointestinal upset. dogs that have adverse food reactions due to a food allergy (typically to a protein in the food) or intolerance benefit from a food designed for food sensitivities. hill's nutritionists and veterinarians developed prescription diet z/d clinical nutrition especially formulated to support your dog's food sensitivities. in fact, z/d is clinically proven nutrition to reduce skin & digestive signs from food intolerances. this canned food has
